title: zentinel pipeline stale context marker v1
description: Emitted by a subagent that stops because its context packet no longer matches repository state. It names the packet that went stale and the inputs that must be refreshed before issuing a replacement packet.

schema_version.description: Pinned schema identity for this artifact.

task_id.description: Three-digit task id the stale packet was scoped to.

role.description: Pipeline role that detected the stale context.

reason.description: Why the packet is stale (for example task state changed, allowed_files differ from queue metadata, referenced prior artifact missing, repository tests no longer match packet evidence).

packet_id.description: packet_id of the context packet that went stale, so the Orchestrator can record it as superseded.

required_refresh.description: Inputs that must be re-read before issuing a fresh packet (for example a queue file or a specific prior handoff).
